steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The verb in the blank belongs to the Continental Army's difficulty in procuring supplies. The head noun is difficulty, which is singular. The intervening phrase about farmers and merchants does not change the subject.

steps.title: Use a finite singular verb
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D use plural verb forms, while Choice B is only a participle and cannot serve as the main verb. The sentence needs a singular finite verb phrase to describe the ongoing difficulty. The answer is C.
